name: Grozak Ironscrivener
sd_appearance: A colossal orc, Grozak Ironscrivener, towers over his colleagues, his deep green eyes focused intently on the crumbling parchment before him. His massive frame, adorned in an ash-white robe of the Guild of Ashen Scrolls, is worn thin at the elbows and knees, fraying at the edges from years of handling ancient manuscripts. A tattered coat, draped casually over his tattered robe, conceals multiple sealed scroll cases. A quill, his metaphorical weapon, rests precariously between his gnarled fingers, while a dagger is tucked into his waistband. A distinct forked tongue flickers, wetting his cracked lips as he deciphers cryptic symbols, a testament to his relentless pursuit of knowledge.
faction_visual: ash-white archival robes, multiple sealed scroll cases, fate-reading tools
style_note: coat over robe, always quill and parchment, forked tongue flickering
